# Repository Description

**For GitHub Settings → About → Description**

## Short Version (160 characters max)

```
Production-ready safety validation for Austrian building compliance. ISO 26262 ASIL-D + EU AI Act. DMACAS + BSH-Träger EC5-AT. TRL 5. Open Source.
```

## Medium Version (260 characters)

```
GENESIS DUAL-SYSTEM V3.0.1: Production-ready safety validation for Austrian building compliance. Combines DMACAS (C++17, ISO 26262 ASIL-D) and BSH-Träger EC5-AT (Python, ÖNORM B 1995-1-1). EU AI Act Article 12 compliant. TRL 5 validated. 7,550+ LOC. Apache 2.0.
```

## Full Version (for About section)

```
GENESIS DUAL-SYSTEM V3.0.1 - Production-ready safety validation system for Austrian building compliance.

Features:
• DMACAS: Multi-Agent Collision Avoidance System (C++17, ISO 26262 ASIL-D principles)
• BSH-Träger EC5-AT: Structural Engineering Validation (Python 3.10+, ÖNORM B 1995-1-1)
• Audit Trail: SHA-256 cryptographic chain (EU AI Act Article 12 compliant)
• TRL 5: Functional Prototype - Validated in Relevant Environment
• 7,550+ LOC production code with 3,200+ lines documentation
• Deterministic, reproducible calculations
• TÜV-Ready architecture
• Fraunhofer IKS validated design

Built for: Ziviltechniker, Structural Engineers, Building Authorities, Research Institutions
Standards: ISO 26262, EU AI Act, ÖNORM B 1995-1-1, EN 14080, ONR 24008-1:2014
License: Apache 2.0 (GENESIS components) + MIT (ORION components)
```

## Website URL

```
https://genesis-at.com
```
*(Create landing page or use GitHub Pages)*

## How to Update

1. Go to repository main page
2. Click ⚙️ gear icon next to "About"
3. Paste description
4. Add website URL
5. Check "Include in the home page"
6. Save changes
